rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND S TOTAH TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Recusal Of Counsel
rulings.Rulings: PETITIONER SAMIR TOTAH, NORMA TOTAH'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Recusal Of Counsel IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/05 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. TROTT IS TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS FOR THE MOTION REQUESTING SANCTIONS WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE ASAP. (301/JLW/DS)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND S TOTAH TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DAVID REPLOGLE, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CAROL TROTT IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/05 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. TROTT IS TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS FOR THE MOTION REQUESTING SANCTIONS WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE ASAP. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DS)
